repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Textiles and Clothing

did.physdesc: Correspondence, photographs, newsletters, memoranda, and a memory book.
did.abstract: Correspondence, photographs, newsletters and memoranda pertaining to Spratt's career in the Department of Textiles and Clothing; includes a memory book created by her students in her last course in the College of Home Economics.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, photographs, newsletters and memoranda pertaining to Spratt's career in the Department of Textiles and Clothing; includes a memory book created by her students in her last course in the College of Home Economics.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Frances M. Spratt papers, #23-3-3150. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Professor in Textiles and Clothing, New York State College of Home Economics, Cornell University.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: . Frances Spratt received her M.S. from Cornell in 1949. She taught for four years at the University of Texas and then returned to Cornell in 1953 as a faculty member. In 1967 she retired as an associate professor in the Department of Textiles and Clothing.

controlaccess.subject: Women college students -- New York (State)
Textile fabrics -- Study and teaching.
Clothing and dress -- Study and teaching.
Fashion.

did.unittitle: Textiles and Clothing Dept. Material - newsletters, memos, sabbatic information
